rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROBIN WILLIAMS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Records Under Seal In Connection With Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset; Memorandum In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Co-Trustees' Motion to File Records Under Seal is DENIED. The Co-Trustees have failed to show that their interest in keeping the documents private overrides the public's interest in open access to court records. (CRC, Rule 2.550(d); NBC Subsidiary (KNBC-TV), Inc. v. Superior Court (Locke) (1999) 20 Cal.4th 1178, 1216-1218.) Co-Trustees have also not shown that the proposed sealing is the least restrictive means to achieve their interest in keeping these documents confidential. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the Court no later than 2/17/2015, at 4:00 p.m. Co-Trustees' counsel shall prepare the proposed order.
